findings.title: Add Notification Priority Levels
findings.description: Implement a three-tier priority system for notifications to visually differentiate between urgent, normal, and low priority alerts. This will help users manage notification fatigue effectively.
assumptions: Users need a clear distinction between notification types.

evidence.excerpt: Propose a three-tier priority system that visually differentiates urgency.

recommendations: Implement backend logic for priority handling

findings.title: Push Notifications Failure on Android 14
findings.description: Push notifications are failing to deliver on Android 14 devices, affecting approximately 8% of users. This issue needs to be resolved to ensure reliable notification delivery.
assumptions: The issue is related to FCM token refresh and permissions.

evidence.excerpt: Several users on Android 14 report that push notifications silently fail.

findings.title: Implement ML-based Notification Batching
findings.description: Develop a machine learning model to batch low-priority notifications into a digest based on user engagement patterns. This will optimize delivery timing and reduce notification overload.
assumptions: User engagement patterns can be effectively learned.

evidence.excerpt: Batch low-priority notifications into a digest delivered at optimal times.

recommendations: Train ML model on historical data

findings.title: Add User Preference Page for Notification Categories
findings.description: Create a settings page allowing users to opt in/out of specific notification categories. This requires a new API endpoint and a React component.
assumptions: Users want control over notification categories.

evidence.excerpt: Users should be able to opt in/out of specific notification categories.

findings.title: Reduce Notification Delivery Latency
findings.description: Optimize the notification delivery pipeline to reduce p95 latency from 340ms to under 200ms by moving to asynchronous writes and batch inserts.
assumptions: Synchronous writes are the main cause of latency.

evidence.excerpt: Root cause appears to be synchronous database writes in the delivery pipeline.

summary: The analysis identifies critical requirements for the SmartNotify system, including the need for priority levels, user preferences, and performance improvements. Key risks include push notification failures on Android 14 and latency issues, both of which are blocking dependencies that must be addressed in the next phases of development.
